formula_note: Directly carries the published massacre range; best value is midpoint for bookkeeping only.
uncertainty_note: Range remains broad because no stronger source was retained in this wave.
quality_note: Usable direct-death range for a bounded massacre, but still denominator-poor.

inflicting_side: Christian militias with Syrian Army support
formula_note: Carries the published siege-plus-massacre death range but preserves unknown status because armed fighters were present and sources do not cleanly separate victim class.
uncertainty_note: The main uncertainty is not just the count but the civilian/combatant composition of the dead.
quality_note: Important bounded episode, but not yet publishable as a civilian-only DR anchor.

victim_side: Palestinian and Lebanese Shiite civilians in Sabra and Shatila
formula_note: Main direct-death estimate carries the public 1,300-3,500 civilian range while using qualitative sources to justify civilian coding.
uncertainty_note: The range is intentionally left wide because public sources still diverge sharply on enumeration.
quality_note: Strongest massacre row in the bundle, but denominator evidence still blocks a full DR.
